message:
fix(upgrade): graceful recovery for pre-0.56 dolt databases (#2137)

Pre-0.56 bd versions used embedded Dolt mode with a library that could
return nil DoltDB values, causing nil pointer panics. While embedded
mode was removed in 0.56.0, users upgrading from pre-0.51 still have
old .beads/dolt/ directories that may be incompatible.

- ensureDoltInit: seeds .bd-dolt-ok marker on existing databases
- RecoverPreV56DoltDir: auto-rebuilds old databases during upgrade
- autoMigrateOnVersionBump: triggers recovery when previousVersion < 0.56
- bd doctor: CheckDoltFormat warns about unmarked dolt directories

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
